data.title: Johnson Controls Announces Strategic Leadership Changes
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Johnson Controls ( (JCI) ).

Johnson Controls announced leadership changes to enhance operational efficiency, with Julie Brandt now leading Global Field Operations and Nathan Manning taking over as Vice President and President of Building Solutions North America. This transition is part of their ongoing efforts to drive simplification and growth, impacting the company’s strategic positioning and operational dynamics.

More about Johnson Controls

Johnson Controls operates in the building solutions industry, providing products and services that enhance building efficiency, security, and comfort. The company focuses on innovative solutions for building automation and energy management, serving a diverse range of markets globally.

data.title: Lantern Pharma Extends CSO’s Employment Agreement
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Lantern Pharma ( (LTRN) ).

Lantern Pharma Inc.’s Board of Directors has approved an amendment to the employment agreement for Kishor G. Bhatia, the Chief Scientific Officer. The amendment extends the agreement’s term to January 15, 2026, adjusts his working hours to 24 per week, and sets his annual base salary at $189,600, effective from the first pay period in January 2025.

data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Lexston Life Sciences Corp. ( (TSE:LEXT) ) has shared an announcement.

Lexston Mining Corporation announced amendments to its Dory Property Option and Project 176 and Project Itza Property Option Agreements. These amendments extend deadlines for exploration expenditures and share issuance, allowing the company more time to fulfill requirements to earn full interests in these projects. This strategic move potentially enhances Lexston’s operational flexibility and strengthens its position in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Lexston Life Sciences Corp.

Lexston Mining Corporation is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing mineral projects to enhance stakeholder value. The company operates mineral exploration projects in British Columbia and Nunavut, Canada, and is listed on the OTCQB Venture Market.

data.title: Nokia Initiates Substantial Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ) is now available.

Nokia Corporation has announced a repurchase of 872,093 of its own shares at an average price of EUR 4.41 each as part of a share buyback program initiated to counteract the dilutive effects of new shares issued to Infinera Corporation’s shareholders. This buyback program, which aims to repurchase up to 150 million shares by the end of 2025, is expected to have a significant financial impact, with a total transaction cost of EUR 3,842,878 on January 10, 2025. The program is in compliance with the Market Abuse Regulation and authorized by Nokia’s Annual General Meeting. The move underscores Nokia’s strategic focus on maintaining shareholder value and aligning its capital structure effectively.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a leader in B2B technology innovation, focusing on pioneering networks that sense, think, and act across mobile, fixed, and cloud networks. The company is known for its high-performance networks that integrate seamlessly into various ecosystems, offering secure and sustainable solutions for service providers, enterprises, and partners globally. Nokia is also recognized for its long-term research and intellectual property led by the renowned Nokia Bell Labs.

YTD Price Performance: 5.02%

Average Trading Volume: 2,488,132

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €24.36B

data.title: Nevada Canyon Gold Announces Promising Drill Results
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Nevada Canyon Gold ( (NGLD) ) has provided an announcement.

Nevada Canyon Gold Corp announced the release of additional drill results from the 2024 reverse circulation drill program on the Lapon Canyon Project. The results show significant gold mineralization, including a robust intercept in drill hole LC-24-117, which suggests potential for expansion of the Hotspot zone at depth. These findings may enhance Nevada Canyon’s royalty interests and improve the project’s prospects, potentially benefiting stakeholders through increased gold recovery.

More about Nevada Canyon Gold

Nevada Canyon Gold Corp is involved in the mining industry, with a focus on owning royalties related to gold mining projects. The company owns a 3% Net Smelter Royalty on the Lapon Canyon Project in Mineral County, Nevada, which is part of the Walker Lane gold trend.

An announcement from Jewett-Cameron Trading Company ( (JCTC) ) is now available.

Jewett-Cameron Trading Company announced it will report its fiscal 2025 first-quarter operational and financial results on January 14, 2025, after market close. The announcement will be followed by a conference call and webcast to discuss the results and hold a Q&A session, offering insights into the company’s performance and market positioning.

The company’s brands include Lucky Dog for pet products, Jewett Cameron Fence for gates and fencing, MyEcoWorld for sustainable bag products, and various brands for greenhouses.

data.title: Cresud Announces Second Interest Payment on Series XLIV Notes
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Cresud Sociedad ( (CRESY) ) has issued an announcement.

Cresud Sociedad Anónima announced the upcoming payment of the second installment of interest on its Series XLIV Fixed Rate Notes, amounting to USD 1,202,780.17, scheduled for January 17, 2025. This payment represents interest accrued between July 17, 2024, and January 17, 2025, with the notes carrying an annual nominal interest rate of 6.00%, showcasing the company’s financial obligations and ongoing commitment to noteholders.

More about Cresud Sociedad

Cresud Sociedad Anónima, Comercial, Inmobiliaria, Financiera y Agropecuaria is a company based in Argentina, primarily involved in the commercial, real estate, financial, and agricultural sectors.

data.description:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Gitennes Exploration ( (TSE:GIT) ) is now available.

Gitennes Exploration Inc. has announced plans to advance its mineral exploration activities in Quebec following a successful $1.5 million private placement. The company has hired Martin Demers, a consulting geologist, to conduct an assessment of its properties, anticipating recommendations for immediate work programs. Additionally, Gitennes has entered into an investor relations agreement with Chad Levesque Consulting to enhance corporate and communications services, aiming to strengthen its market presence and shareholder value in 2025.

More about Gitennes Exploration

Gitennes Exploration Inc. operates in the mineral exploration industry, focusing primarily on discovering and developing gold and battery metal properties. The company targets under-explored areas in Quebec with potential for significant mineral deposits.
